# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateReport(PDO $pdo, array $postData): array
{
    $baseSql = "SELECT id, order_date, status, category, amount, customer_name, description FROM orders";
    $whereClauses = [];
    $params = [];

    $startDate = $postData['start_date'] ?? date('Y-m-01');
    $endDate = $postData['end_date'] ?? date('Y-m-d');
    
    if (!preg_match("/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/", $startDate) || !preg_match("/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/", $endDate)) {
        $startDate = date('Y-m-01');
        $endDate = date('Y-m-d');
    }

    $whereClauses[] = "order_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date";
    $params[':start_date'] = $startDate;
    $params[':end_date'] = $endDate;

    if (!empty($postData['status'])) {
        $statuses = is_array($postData['status']) ? $postData['status'] : explode(',', $postData['status']);
        $statuses = array_map('trim', $statuses);
        $statuses = array_filter($statuses);

        if (!empty($statuses)) {
            $statusPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($statuses as $index => $status) {
                $placeholder = ":status_" . $index;
                $statusPlaceholders[] = $placeholder;
                $params[$placeholder] = $status;
            }
            $whereClauses[] = "status IN (" . implode(', ', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
        }
    }

    if (!empty($postData['category'])) {
        $categories = is_array($postData['category']) ? $postData['category'] : explode(',', $postData['category']);
        $categories = array_map('trim', $categories);
        $categories = array_filter($categories);

        if (!empty($categories)) {
            $categoryPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($categories as $index => $category) {
                $placeholder = ":category_" . $index;
                $categoryPlaceholders[] =
